autoscaling.description:
Horizontal Pod Autoscaler. When enabled, the Deployment omits its own replicas
field so the HPA owns scaling.

behavior.description: Scaling behavior (scaleUp/scaleDown policies, templated); empty uses the cluster defaults.
behavior.title: behavior

enabled.description: Create a HorizontalPodAutoscaler (autoscaling/v2) targeting the Deployment.
enabled.title: enabled

targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.description: Target average CPU utilization (%); 0 disables the CPU metric.
targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.title: targetCPUUtilizationPercentage

targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage.description: Target average memory utilization (%); 0 disables the memory metric.
targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage.title: targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage

autoscaling.title: autoscaling

config.description:
echo's runtime configuration. Each key maps to an ECHO_* environment variable
the binary reads; see the README for the full reference.

disableRequestLogs.description: Silence the per-request access log (ECHO_DISABLE_REQUEST_LOGS); the echo response is unaffected.
disableRequestLogs.title: disableRequestLogs

echoBackToClient.description: Return the JSON document to the client (ECHO_BACK_TO_CLIENT); false replies 204 No Content.
echoBackToClient.title: echoBackToClient

kubernetes.description: Add a `kubernetes` object (pod/namespace/IP/node) to responses, injected via the Downward API (ECHO_KUBERNETES). Off by default; it reveals cluster topology to callers.
kubernetes.title: kubernetes

logLevel.description: Log level (ECHO_LOG_LEVEL): debug, info, warn, or error.
logLevel.title: logLevel

maxBodyBytes.description: Maximum request body bytes read and echoed (ECHO_MAX_BODY_BYTES); larger bodies are flagged truncated.
maxBodyBytes.title: maxBodyBytes

metricsEnabled.description: Expose Prometheus metrics at /metrics on metricsPort (ECHO_METRICS_ENABLED).
metricsEnabled.title: metricsEnabled

metricsPort.description: Monitoring listen port; serves both /metrics and the /healthz probe endpoint (the probes target it). Exported to the binary as ECHO_METRICS_ADDR=":<metricsPort>".
metricsPort.title: metricsPort

trustedProxies.description: CIDRs whose X-Forwarded-For header is trusted for client-IP resolution (ECHO_TRUSTED_PROXIES); comma-joined into the env var.
trustedProxies.title: trustedProxies

wsAllowedOrigins.description: Origin host patterns allowed to open a WebSocket (ECHO_WS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS); empty allows any origin (the endpoint only echoes the caller's own frames).
wsAllowedOrigins.title: wsAllowedOrigins

wsEnabled.description: Serve a WebSocket echo at /ws (ECHO_WS_ENABLED); non-upgrade requests to /ws fall through to the HTTP echo.
wsEnabled.title: wsEnabled

config.title: config

deploymentAnnotations.description: Annotations added to the Deployment (workload) metadata, e.g. `reloader.stakater.com/auto: "true"`.
deploymentAnnotations.title: deploymentAnnotations

env.description: Extra environment variables for the echo container, as a map (templated).
env.title: env

envFrom.description: Sources of environment variables for the echo container (templated), e.g. a Secret with TLS material.
envFrom.title: envFrom

extraEnv.description:
TZ: UTC
Extra environment variables for the echo container, as a raw list (templated).
extraEnv.title: extraEnv

fullnameOverride.description: Override the generated name used for every resource's `metadata.name` (the chart "fullname").
fullnameOverride.title: fullnameOverride

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

httpRoute.description:
Gateway API HTTPRoute — an alternative to `ingress` for clusters using the
Gateway API. Named `httpRoute` (not `route`) to avoid confusion with the
OpenShift Route kind.

apiVersion.description: HTTPRoute apiVersion; empty defaults to gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1.
apiVersion.title: apiVersion

enabled.description: Expose echo via a Gateway API HTTPRoute (alternative to ingress).
enabled.title: enabled

hostnames.description:
- name: gateway
   namespace: gateway
   sectionName: https
Hostnames matched against the Host header (templated).
hostnames.title: hostnames

kind.description: HTTPRoute kind; empty defaults to HTTPRoute.
kind.title: kind

matches.description:
- echo.example.com
Match conditions for the default rule.
matches.title: matches

parentRefs.description: Gateways (and listeners) this route attaches to.
parentRefs.title: parentRefs

httpRoute.title: httpRoute

digest.description: Pin the image by digest (sha256:…); set by the release pipeline. When set, it overrides the tag.
digest.title: digest

tag.description: Overrides the image tag; defaults to the chart appVersion.
tag.title: tag

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private registries.
imagePullSecrets.title: imagePullSecrets

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe. Targets the monitoring port (metrics), which also serves /healthz.
livenessProbe.title: livenessProbe

enabled.description: Create a Prometheus Operator ServiceMonitor (requires its CRDs and config.metricsEnabled).
enabled.title: enabled

nameOverride.description: Override the app name used in the `app.kubernetes.io/name` label.
nameOverride.title: nameOverride

enabled.description: Create a PodDisruptionBudget. Off by default; useful when running multiple replicas.
enabled.title: enabled

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum pods that may be unavailable, as a count or percentage; takes precedence over `minAvailable` when set.
maxUnavailable.title: maxUnavailable

minAvailable.description: Minimum pods that must stay available, as a count or percentage. Used unless `maxUnavailable` is set.
minAvailable.title: minAvailable

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level securityContext (runs as non-root uid/gid 65532 with the default seccomp profile).
podSecurityContext.title: podSecurityContext

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClass for the pod (templated); empty uses the cluster default.
priorityClassName.title: priorityClassName

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe. Targets the monitoring port (metrics), which also serves /healthz.
readinessProbe.title: readinessProbe

replicaCount.description: Number of echo replicas (echo is stateless, so it scales horizontally). Ignored when autoscaling.enabled.
replicaCount.title: replicaCount

securityContext.description: echo container securityContext (no privilege escalation, read-only root filesystem, drops ALL capabilities).
securityContext.title: securityContext

externalTrafficPolicy.description: Service externalTrafficPolicy (`Local` preserves the client source IP; only applies to NodePort/LoadBalancer). Empty uses the cluster default.
externalTrafficPolicy.title: externalTrafficPolicy

automount.description: Mount the API token. echo never calls the Kubernetes API, so this is off by default.
automount.title: automount

name.description: ServiceAccount name; empty uses the chart fullname.
name.title: name

startupProbe.description: Startup probe; gates liveness/readiness until echo is up, so a slow start can't trigger a premature restart. Targets the monitoring port (metrics). Set to {} to disable.
startupProbe.title: startupProbe

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Grace period for a clean shutdown.
terminationGracePeriodSeconds.title: terminationGracePeriodSeconds

repository.description: `helm test` connection-pod image; a gcr-mirrored curl, so the test never pulls from Docker Hub.
repository.title: repository

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for the pods (templated); relevant at replicaCount > 1, e.g. to spread across zones.
topologySpreadConstraints.title: topologySpreadConstraints

volumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts on the echo container (templated).
volumeMounts.title: volumeMounts

volumes.description: Additional volumes on the Deployment pod (templated).
volumes.title: volumes
